description: Add three new area code definitions to the Vicidial system based on the data in ~/Documents/VicidialData/new_areacodes.csv. New area code overlays have been announced for Florida, Tennessee, and South Carolina; you must add them to Vicidial so the dialer knows their time zones. Log in to Vicidial Admin using credentials (User: 6666, Password: andromeda) and ensure all fields (Country Code, Area Code, GMT Offset, DST, DST Range, State, Description) match the CSV exactly.
